allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://beta.pokeapi.co/graphql/v1beta -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"":""{ pokemon_v2_pokemonspecies\(where: {id: {_in: [37, 38]}}\) { id name pokemon_v2_pokemons\(order_by: {id: asc}\) { id is_default pokemon_v2_pokemonforms\(limit: 1\) { form_name } } } }""}')
